name: SmartOnFhirV2DiscoveryAdvertisesBackendServices
title: SMART on FHIR v2 — discovery advertises Backend Services (client_credentials)
description: SMART Backend Services (the JWT-signed client_credentials flow defined in SMART App Launch IG v2 §6) is the canonical mechanism for headless server-to-server access — needed for Bulk Data and many integrations. Servers MAY support it; presence of client_credentials in grant_types_supported (or token_endpoint_auth_methods_supported including private_key_jwt) is the discovery signal.
